text.message: centre deserts are so weird, never know what to do
why is red not blocking blue and black not robbing blue…
they are both going to lose
you can expand to sheep port matey
i made mistake of not going for sheep port
rob should be oj. they are getting road
oj has a literary reference in his name, he's golden in my books
they can definitely city more easily, but I respect either call at this point
tough when multiple players are close
want me to take road here?
with your ports u are near
